title: Generate R program for 14-6.02 Laboratory Shift Table

inputs.prompt: Write an R program using rtables or Tplyr to generate 14-6.02: Laboratory Shift Table. The program must: (1) Read ADLBC dataset, (2) Filter to Safety population, (3) Implement analysis: reference range shifts from baseline to post-baseline, high/low/normal transitions, (4) Format table with treatment group columns (Placebo, Xanomeline Low, Xanomeline High), (5) Output as RTF document matching mock shell layout.
